Off Calendar Jul-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Jul-07-2010 Continued To Jul-21-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (269-271 Carl St., San Francisco, Ca 94117)
Off Calendar Mar-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maria Yuen for and with Kyle Lopes.

Ms. Yuen stated that there was no need for a blocked account and stated the terms of the sale for the record. The sale was confirmed at $1,100,000.00 of which only 50% of the property is subject to court confirmation. Bond is waived. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the written order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
